summary: Top signals: xAI Grok 4.5 launch, Tencent/Manus deal; user workflows (error log troubleshooting, agent feedback loop); infra primitives (Runeward sandbox, mcp-hub, Confessor); Codex subagent encryption. | Official vendor signals show Anthropic containment engineering, JetBrains Kotlin benchmark for AI, Mistral Vibe coding agent, Daytona sandbox funding, and Google ADK 2.0 multi-agent framework. Cursor/Mistral/Modal/deepseek platform updates dominate mainstream product news. | Multiple agent platform releases (Claude Code, Codex, OpenHands, Cline, Qwen Code, Gemini CLI, Zed, OpenCode) and new infra primitives (sandbox, eval, MCP safety, browser runtime) dominate this shard. User workflow signals are sparse; gaps noted. | Package sources screening: top mainstream releases (OpenAI Codex, GitHub Copilot, CrewAI, AutoGen, Vercel, Google ADK, HashiCorp MCP); strong infra primitives for memory, security, observability, eval; missing user workflows and social discussion sources.
